element_introduction_order.element: Doubles mode (2 players cooperative vs 2 AI)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Team-based play with human partner coordination

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based sport rhythm with variable rally duration based on AI difficulty setting

difficulty_curve.early_game: Adjustable from novice to expert via 5-level AI difficulty selection
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Maintained difficulty tier through match progression
difficulty_curve.late_game: Same difficulty tier persists; player must manually select higher difficulty for increased challenge
notable_spikes: Transition from difficulty level 1 to 2 in AI opponent behavior
Difficulty levels 4-5 represent significant skill floor increase

notable_level_patterns.description: Singles mode: one human player against one AI opponent; predetermined match format with serve/rally/scoring mechanics
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any singles match at selected difficulty

notable_level_patterns.description: Two human players on same team against two AI opponents; requires partner coordination and team strategy
Five discrete AI difficulty levels available for opponent behavior, allowing players to progress through skill tiers
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any match with adjustable AI difficulty 1-5
